name: Rolled Sugar-Mace Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: -BH&G HERITAGE COOKBOOK
Cream sugar and butter. Add egg, milk, and vanilla; beat well. Stir together flour, baking powder, mace, and 1/2 teaspoon salt; blend into creamed mixture. Divide in half. Cover; chill for 1 hour. On lightly floured surface, roll each half to 1/8-inch thickness. Cut with cookie cutters. Bake on an ungreased cookie sheet at 375°F for 7 to 8 minutes.
